name: ChampVoice
description: AI calling agent — initiates outbound ElevenLabs voice calls via the champiq-voice gateway. Credentials hold the gateway URL + optional X-Api-Key. Agent ID can be set globally (credential) or overridden per-call (inputs).

actions.label: Initiate Call
actions.description: Start an AI voice call to a prospect. Sends to the champiq-voice gateway which calls ElevenLabs. agent_id in inputs overrides the credential-level default — use different agents for different call purposes.

to_number.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +15551234567

lead_name.description: Prospect's full name — injected as ElevenLabs dynamic variable 'lead_name'

company.description: Prospect's company — injected as dynamic variable 'company'

email.description: Prospect's email — injected as dynamic variable 'email'

agent_id.description: ElevenLabs agent ID for this call. Overrides the credential-level default. Use different IDs for cold outreach vs. follow-up vs. qualification agents.

script.description: Custom script override — injected as dynamic variable 'script'. Overrides the agent's built-in script.

call_reason.description: Context for why this call is being made — injected as dynamic variable 'call_reason' to shape the agent's opening.

engagement_status.description: Prospect engagement status from ChampGraph (e.g. 'replied', 'opened') — injected as dynamic variable so the agent can personalize the conversation.

dynamic_vars.description: Additional key-value pairs injected as ElevenLabs dynamic variables. Values must be strings. Merged with lead_name, company, email, call_reason, engagement_status.

flow_id.description: ChampIQ Canvas flow ID — passed to the gateway so call events reference this flow.

canvas_node_id.description: Canvas node ID — passed to gateway for call event routing back to this node.

actions.label: Get Call Status
actions.description: Poll the champiq-voice gateway for the current state of a call, including transcript, outcome, and duration.

call_id.description: ChampIQ call ID returned by initiate_call (callId field)

actions.label: List Calls
actions.description: Retrieve call history from the gateway. Filter by contact phone or canvas flow ID.

contact.description: E.164 phone number to filter by (returns all calls to this contact)

flow_id.description: Canvas flow ID to filter by

actions.label: Cancel Call
actions.description: Not supported — ElevenLabs does not expose a cancellation API for in-flight calls. This action will return an error. Use get_call_status to monitor calls.

triggers.label: On Call Initiated
triggers.description: Fires immediately when a call is dispatched to ElevenLabs (before it connects)

triggers.label: On Call Completed
triggers.description: Fires when the call ends with outcome: qualified, not_qualified, callback, or voicemail

triggers.label: On Call Failed
triggers.description: Fires when ElevenLabs reports a failed/no-answer call

triggers.label: On Transcript Ready
triggers.description: Fires after call.completed when a transcript is available. Use to route to LLM summary node.
